_patch_meta.description: Correction patch: restore G1271 dianoia, G3563 nous, G5426 froneō, G3105 mainomai from delete to extracted — researcher confirmed all four are core mind vocabulary and must be included in Session B analysis

operations.description: Restore nous — primary NT mind/understanding term, core registry vocabulary
Restore dianoia — thinking faculty/understanding, core NT mind vocabulary
Restore froneō — to think/set the mind on, high-frequency Pauline mind vocabulary
Restore mainomai — to be out of one's mind/mad, attests the boundary state of mind in NT usage
Registry status confirmed Pre-Analysis Complete after correction of four erroneously deleted terms
